briefdescription.para: Default PPK hash size in words.

sectiondef.header: Timeout in term of number of times status register polled to check eFuse programming operation complete
Timeout in term of number of times status register polled to check eFuse Cache load is done

briefdescription.para: Number of bits in a byte.
PPK hash size in bytes for parts-SU10P,SU25P,SU35P.
PPK hash size in bytes for all other parts except SU10P,SU25P,SU35P.
AES revoke ID number of rows.
Set efuse clock frequency from user.
0x70 - Error dec only key must be programmed
0x90 - Error hash or puf key must be programmed
0x8F00 - Error write AES read write lock0
0x9000 - Error write AES read write lock1
0xA300 - Error write hash puf or key
0xA700 - Error write jtag error out disable
0xAC00 - Error write OSPI Reset Recovery Delay Control
0xAD00 - Error write ROM RSVD OSPI Device Reset Choice
0xAE00 - Error write ROM OSPI Cmd Seq Ctrl

listitem.para: Error write SCAN_CLEAR_EN

briefdescription.para: 0xB000 - Error read Boot mode disable bits from cache
0xB100 - Error write QSPI24 Boot mode disable
0xB200 - Error write QSPI32 Boot mode disable
0xB300 - Error write OSPI Boot mode disable
0xB400 - Error write SMAP Boot mode disable
0xB500 - Error write SERIAL Boot mode disable
0xB900 - Error write JTAG Boot mode disable
This function is used to program the eFUSE of spartan ultrascale plus, based on user inputs.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if programs successfully.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_NTHG_TO_BE_PROGRAMMED - Nothing to be programmed
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING - Error before programming

simplesect.para: After eFUSE programming is complete, the cache is automatically reloaded so all programmed eFUSE bits can be directly read from cache.

listitem.para: Initialize Efuse clock settings and validate frequency
Perform temperature and voltage checks before programming
Sets up Efuse controller with validated frequency
Validate all the write requests for AesKeys, PPK hash 0/1/2, Ivs, DecOnly eFuses
Program AES keys to eFUSE if AES key data is provided
Program PPK hash to eFUSE if PPK hash data is provided
Program AES IV to eFUSE if IV data is provided
Program user fuse to eFUSE if user fuse data is provided
Program SPK revoke ID to eFUSE if SPK revoke data is provided
Program AES revoke ID to eFUSE if AES revoke data is provided
Program DEC only eFUSE bits if DEC only data is provided
Program Xilinx control eFUSE bits if Xilinx control data is provided
Program security control bits to eFUSE if security control data is provided
Reload eFUSE cache after all programming operations are complete
Reset read mode and disable programming controller regardless of programming status
Lock eFUSE controller

briefdescription.para: This function reads secure control bits and CRC_EN register bits from eFUSE cache.

detaileddescription.para:
SecCtrlBits
- Pointer to XNvm_EfuseSecCtrlBits where secure control bits are read.
Device-specific behavior: **SPARTANUPLUS devices:** - Supports PPK0, PPK1, and PPK2 (three PPK hashes) - PPK hash size: 256 bits (32 bytes) - Reads Ppk2lck and Ppk2Invld bits for PPK2 - PPK2 eFUSE registers are shared between PPK2 hash and PUF hash storage - The HashPufOrKey bit determines which hash type is stored: * When HashPufOrKey = 0: PPK2 registers contain PPK2 hash * When HashPufOrKey = 1: PPK2 registers contain PUF hash - When programming PUF hash: * Ppk2Invld must be 0 (PPK2 register not invalidated) * Ppk2lck must be 0 (PPK2 register not write-locked) * PPK2 registers must not be already programmed * HashPufOrKey must be set to 1 to indicate PUF hash usage
**SPARTANUPLUSAES1 devices:** - Supports only PPK0 and PPK1 (two PPK hashes) - PPK hash size: 384 bits (48 bytes) - Ppk2lck and Ppk2Invld fields are not available - Reads Ppk1lck and Ppk1Invld bits for PPK1 - PPK1 eFUSE registers are shared between PPK1 hash and PUF hash storage - The HashPufOrKey bit determines which hash type is stored: * When HashPufOrKey = 0: PPK1 registers contain PPK1 hash * When HashPufOrKey = 1: PPK1 registers contain PUF hash - When programming PUF hash: * Ppk1Invld must be 0 (PPK1 register not invalidated) * Ppk1lck must be 0 (PPK1 register not write-locked) * PPK1 registers must not be already programmed * HashPufOrKey must be set to 1 to indicate PUF hash usage
XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid parameter.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CACHE_PARITY - Parity Error exist in cache.
This function reads secure control bits and CRC_EN register bits from eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the Xnvm_SecCtrlBits which holds the read secure control bits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On Successful read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM On Invalid Parameter.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CACHE_PARITY Error while Cache reload.
Validate output pointer before reading security control eFUSE bits
Read security control eFUSE cache register and extract individual bit fields
Read CRC enable eFUSE cache register and extract CRC, DFT, lockdown and RMA bit fields
Perform input parameter validation. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Read Directly from cache offset of security control to fill the SecCtrlBits structure. Return XST_SUCCESS if read is success.

briefdescription.para: This function reads PPK0/1/2 hash based on XNvm_EfusePpkType from eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: - is of type XNvm_EfusePpkType i.e. PPK0/1/2.
- Size of PPK it is either 32 or 48 bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - Invalid input parameter.
XST_FAILURE - Error in cache read operation.
Validate input parameters before reading PPK hash from eFUSE cache
Determine PPK start offset based on PPK type and read the hash from cache range

briefdescription.para: This function reads SPK revoke id from eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: - is pointer to SPK revoke data.
- SPK revoke row to be read it can be either 0/1/2.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
Validate input parameters before reading SPK revoke ID from eFUSE cache
Read SPK revoke ID from computed cache offset based on revoke row index

briefdescription.para: This function reads AES revoke id from eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: - is pointer to AES revoke data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
Validate input pointer before reading AES revoke ID from eFUSE cache
Read AES revoke ID value from eFUSE cache

briefdescription.para: This function reads user efuses from eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: - is pointer to AES revoke data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
Validate input pointer before reading user fuse from eFUSE cache
Read user fuse value from eFUSE cache

briefdescription.para: This function reads IV based on XNvm_EfuseIvType from eFUSE cache.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
Validate input parameters and select IV start offset based on IV type
Read IV data from eFUSE cache starting at the determined offset

briefdescription.para: This function reads DNA from eFUSE cache.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
Validate input pointer before reading DNA from eFUSE cache
Read DNA data from eFUSE cache over the DNA word range

briefdescription.para: This function reads DEC only fuses from eFUSE cache.

detaileddescription.para:
DecOnly
- Pointer to the DEC only efuse data.
XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
This function reads DEC only fuses from eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the DecOnly efuse data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On Successful read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM On Invalid Parameter.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_RD_DEC_ONLY Error in reading in Dec_only efuses.

simplesect.para: If DecOnly eFuse is programmed that means boot can happen in only Symmetric HWRoT boot mode.

listitem.para: Validate input pointer before reading DEC only eFUSE value from cache
Read DEC only value from eFUSE cache
Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Read directly from cache offset of the DecOnly eFuse to fill the input param. Return XST_SUCCESS if read success.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Xilinx Ctrl fuse from eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the XilinxCtrl efuse data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - Specified data read.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid parameter
Validate input pointer before reading Xilinx control eFUSE from cache
Read Xilinx control register from eFUSE cache and extract individual eFUSE bit fields
